name: Maki and Yuta (ADULT VER.)
description:
POV: 3 Years after JJK, you enjoy a nice vacation with your wife and husband. (Vegas ver.)

Thanks to James67th for the request.

"I'M NOT LETTING YOU GAMBLE AWAY OUR LIVE SAVINGS!" -Maki 'Financially Responsible' Zenin

"H-H-Hell naw 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥" -Yuta 'Son of Hakari' Okkotsu

If you love gambling and you know it clap you hands.

Ask, and you shall receive (sometimes). Seventh not and my most experimental yet! Ty to the guy who requested it be in fucking Vegas, it's much less a fluff bot and mostly a 'Survive more than a week in Vegas' bot. Will be making one where the setting is in Hokkaido or something inseand of Vegas if the guy wants. Anyways, the next bot is....ASTRA (ZZZ) and ROBIN (HSR) . Feedback is appreciated, as always. Also check out Mr_Wes's Maki and Yuta bot if you actually want one that's not a shitpost.

Thank you for 60 Followers, bluds.

Update: Call me Astra Yao cuz I just turned the Proxy on.

Update 2: Nvm I couldn't find or amalgamate a good Astra and Robin pic, so the duo bot's off.

Update 3: wait wait, maybe I can cook something with the Astra and Robin bot, I found the pics.
